description: Animates a child view using keyframe tracks for opacity, scale, and rotation with precise timing control.

initialValue.description: Starting animated values before the first keyframe

trigger.description: What starts each animation cycle; default 'onAppear'

timerInterval.description: Timer interval in seconds for 'onTimer' trigger; default 1.0

stateKey.description: State key watched for 'onStateChange' trigger; default 'counter'

autoreverses.description: Reverse on alternate cycles; default false

delay.description: Delay in seconds before the animation starts; default 0

keyframes.description: Object keyed by percentage strings ('0%', '50%', '100%'). Each value is a keyframe: {type, value: {opacity?, scale?, rotation?}, duration, [spring/cubic params]}

states.currentRepeatCount.description: Number of animation cycles completed; read-only
